segment_policy_doc.name: Item 1 / MD&A — operating segment structure
segment_policy_doc.excerpt:
Item 1. Business

Effective January 1, 2025, we sunset our Global Ventures operating segment to streamline and simplify our operating structure. The Global Ventures operating segment was established in 2019 primarily to oversee the Company's ownership of Costa Limited ("Costa"), innocent and doğadan. The results of the Costa (excluding the ready-to-drink business), innocent and doğadan businesses are now reported within the Company's Europe, Middle East and Africa ("EMEA") operating segment.

Our organizational structure consists of the following operating segments: EMEA; Latin America; North America; Asia Pacific; and Bottling Investments. Our operating structure also includes Corporate, which consists of a center and a platform services organization.

section_registry.filing_label: Item 1 / MD&A — five operating segments (Global Ventures sunset 2025-01-01)
Note 20 — Operating Segments (Total net operating revenues + Eliminations, FY2025)
MD&A — net operating revenues percent change decomposition table

policy_notes.statement: Effective January 1, 2025, the Company sunset its Global Ventures operating segment; Costa (excluding ready-to-drink), innocent and doğadan results are reported within EMEA — do not treat Global Ventures as a sixth reportable segment for FY2025.
